description_long: This is a robust, floor-standing base cabinet constructed from what appears to be heavily weathered or distressed wood, giving it a rustic, industrial look. The front features a combination of two paneled doors on the left, three stacked drawers on the right, and an open shelving section in the center, all equipped with round knob handles. The top surface is broad and flat, bordered at the back by a raised lip, making it suitable for use as a workbench or storage counter. The sides and back are plain, with the same textured wood finish, and the cabinet sits on a slightly recessed base. The visible hardware is minimal, with only the knobs and faint outlines of hinges present. This piece would be well-suited for use in a garage, workshop, or utility area in an urban environment.
description: A large, rustic base cabinet with paneled doors, drawers, and open shelving, finished in distressed wood with round knob handles. The flat top and sturdy build make it ideal for utility or workshop use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, textured wood panel with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a wide, uninterrupted wood panel with a raised lip along the top edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain wood panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Front view revealing two paneled doors, three drawers with knobs, and a central open shelving section, as well as the flat worktop with a raised back lip.
attribute_door_configuration: double door with drawers and open shelf
